2322500.name: Starblast: 3D Wars
2322500.description:
Starblast: 3D Wars is a new take on the twin-stick genre by adding a refined dash mechanic, nice visuals, and an ungodly plethora of colors!

This game has:
  • Familiar arcade gameplay with inspiration from a specific classic from the seventh generation, given new life with modernized controls and new mechanics!
  • Several ways to play: Lots of modes to choose from that have unique rulesets and gimmicks to spice up gameplay!
  • Several types of enemies, each with their own behavioral pattern that can be learned and strategized around!
  • Integrated Steam Leaderboards: compete with friends and strangers alike by aiming for the highest scores possible!
  • Much more!
